name: aionis-codex
description: Automatic Aionis Runtime integration for Codex: task-start recall, context assembly, replay capture, handoff, governance, and MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Automatic execution memory and runtime context for Codex
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to Aionis Runtime through lifecycle hooks and MCP tools. It can auto-start the local runtime, assemble task-start context, retrieve continuity and governance packs, record tool execution replay, store handoffs, and expose the complete runtime API surface to Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use Aionis memory for this coding task
Resume this project with Aionis context
